series_metadata.series_title: License Applications for Dealers and, Liveries
series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains documents generally associated with the license applications submitted by boat dealers and liveries to the Division of Parks and Watercraft, including by not limited to: license applications, documents supporting the applications, and a log of license numbers.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: being created or State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Department-wide audit are conducted by State Auditor, whichever is later ; Paper: being created or State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Department-wide audit are conducted by State Auditor, whichever is later, unless paper records are converted and saved in an electronic format. these documents are saved in an electronic format, paper copy may be shredded
